description: You can execute these commands from the Cortex XSOAR CLI, as part of an automation, or in a playbook. After you successfully execute a command, a DBot message appears in the War Room with the command details.
examples:
Command Example
#
!unshorten-me-unshorten-url shortUrl="https://bit.ly/3DKWm5t"
Human Readable Output
#
unshorten.me
results
#

!unshorten-me-unshorten-url shortUrl="https://bit.ly/3DKWm5t"
Human Readable Output
#
unshorten.me
results
#
Unshortened URL:
https://www.youtube.com/

outputs.description: The full, original destination URL. unshortenMe.shortened_url The shortened URL that was provided as input.
outputs.name: unshortenMe.unshortened_url

outputs.description: True if the operation was successful, otherwise False
outputs.name: unshortenMe.success
